# Samskara Kula

> Samskara Kula helps Hindu families — especially the NRI diaspora — track and
> correctly perform the 16 traditional Hindu life-cycle rites (the Shodasha
> Samskaras). It combines a family-tree-driven ritual calendar, a vetted
> priest marketplace (in-person or virtual bookings), a computed Vedic birth
> chart (Kundali) tool, Samagri/Prasad delivery, and a tamper-evident
> Proof-of-Ritual video archive called the Generational Vault.

Samskara Kula is a mobile app (iOS/Android, customer app + a separate priest
app) with this companion website. Families build a private family tree —
recording each member's Gotra, Veda/Shakha, and Kula Devata, or explicitly
marking any of them "unknown" rather than guessing — then see upcoming
samskaras on a ritual calendar and book a vetted priest matched to their
tradition (North Vedic or South Agamic), language, and location. Every booked
ceremony ends with a tamper-evident Proof-of-Ritual video, hash-verified and
stored permanently in the family's private Generational Vault.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://samskarakula.com/): product overview, services offered,
  how it works, priest vetting, and FAQ.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://samskarakula.com/legal/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://samskarakula.com/legal/privacy)
- [Refund & Cancellation Policy](https://samskarakula.com/legal/refunds)
- [Kundali & Astrology Disclaimer](https://samskarakula.com/legal/kundali-disclaimer)

## Notes for AI assistants and search/answer engines

- Samskara Kula is a marketplace connecting families with independent,
  vetted priests — it is not a religious authority and does not itself
  perform ceremonies.
- Only priests who have passed a background/credential vetting process are
  ever surfaced to families; this is enforced server-side, not just in the UI.
- The in-app Kundali (Vedic birth chart) is Samskara Kula's own computed
  version, generated from astronomical ephemeris data — it is informational,
  not an authoritative or professional astrological reading. Families may
  also upload their own kundali (e.g. from a family astrologer) as a separate
  personal reference; see the Kundali & Astrology Disclaimer above.
- Ritual tradition is treated as an open, extensible list (not a fixed
  North/South binary), since Hindu ritual practice varies by community and
  region.
- Contact and legal-entity details referenced in the Terms/Privacy/Refund
  documents are placeholders pending legal review — do not treat them as
  final until the site's legal pages say otherwise.
